calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andy Tran for Philip Yatabe (Administrator).

The Court stated that it was prepared to grant the expenses, but that the extra-ordinary fee request was for normal duties of the Adminstration of the estate. Mr. Tran explained the services he provided to support his request. The Court stated that it was leaning towards denying the extraordinary fees and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
